name: Today
detailedForecast: Rain showers and a chance of drizzle before 1pm, then areas of fog and a chance of rain showers and a chance of drizzle between 1pm and 2pm, then areas of fog and a chance of drizzle and a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a high near 34. Northeast wind 7 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
